sourceRef: tip:Knowing when to hand off to the VA directly

slides.headline: Empower VA Certifications
slides.body: Automate & streamline your VA School Certifying Officer (VASCO) duties.

slides.headline: Identify Certifiable Courses
slides.body: Quickly determine which courses qualify for VA benefits.

slides.headline: Automate Eligibility Checks
slides.body: Simplify the process of verifying student eligibility for VA benefits.

slides.headline: Track Student Compliance
slides.body: Monitor and document student compliance with VA regulations.

slides.headline: Support Student Veterans
slides.body: Facilitate a smoother transition for student veterans into post-secondary education.

slides.headline: Compliance Matters
slides.body: Ensure your institution remains compliant with VA regulations.

outline.caption: Empower VA Certifications: Automate & streamline your VASCO duties. Identify certifiable courses, automate eligibility checks, track student compliance, support student veterans, and ensure compliance. Ready to start? Link in bio.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 5, 'Compliance Matters,' as it could benefit from a more detailed bullet point to further explain the benefits of compliance tracking.
